title: Letter B Adventure
description: Learn the letter B with the butterfly, bear, and ball
learningObjectives: Identify B-words: butterfly, bear, ball, boat, banana

characters.prompt: Friendly cartoon tutor character, neutral expression, standing pose, simple 2D style, bold outlines, flat colors, educational, transparent background
Friendly cartoon tutor character, happy smiling expression, excited pose, simple 2D style, bold outlines, warm colors, transparent background
Friendly cartoon tutor character, thinking expression, hand on chin, curious pose, simple 2D style, transparent background
Friendly cartoon tutor character, warm encouraging expression, supportive pose, thumbs up, simple 2D style, transparent background
Friendly cartoon tutor character, waving hand, welcoming smile, simple 2D style, bold outlines, transparent background

objects.prompt: Cute cartoon butterfly, colorful wings, friendly face, simple 2D style, bold outlines, flying pose, transparent background
Cute cartoon teddy bear, brown fur, friendly smiling face, simple 2D style, bold outlines, standing pose, transparent background
Colorful cartoon ball, red and blue stripes, simple round shape, friendly style, transparent background
Cute cartoon sailboat, white sail, blue hull, simple 2D style, floating on invisible water, transparent background
Cartoon yellow banana, curved shape, simple 2D style, friendly face optional, bold outlines, transparent background
Cartoon red apple, from Letter A lesson, friendly face, simple 2D style, transparent background
Cute cartoon gray cat, sitting pose, simple 2D style, starts with C sound, transparent background
Cute cartoon brown dog, sitting pose, friendly expression, simple 2D style, starts with D sound, transparent background

letters.prompt: Cartoon uppercase letter B, blue color with light blue highlights, playful 3D-ish style, bold outlines, friendly, transparent background
Cartoon lowercase letter b, blue color, playful rounded style, bold outlines, friendly, transparent background
Cartoon uppercase letter A, orange color (from previous lesson), review reference, transparent background
Cartoon uppercase letter C, green color, preview for next lesson, subtle glow, transparent background

Friendly forest scene with trees, soft green colors, woodland setting, gentle sunlight through trees, flat cartoon illustration style

narration.text: Hello again, friend! Ready for a new adventure? Today we're meeting the letter B!
This is the letter B. It makes the buh-buh-buh sound. Say it with me: Buh!
First, let's listen carefully. I'm going to say some words that start with B.
Butterfly! B-b-butterfly! See how my mouth starts with the B sound?
Bear! B-b-bear! Big brown bear!
Ball! B-b-ball! Bounce, bounce, bounce!
Now you try! Listen to each word and tap the picture that starts with the B sound.
Great listening! Now let's find all the B things. Look at each picture. Does it start with B? Tap the B ones!
Remember: Butterfly, Bear, Ball, Boat, Banana. All start with buh-buh-buh!
Now let's write the letter B! Use your finger to trace the lines on the screen. Start at the top and go down, then make two bumps!
Start at the top! Go straight down...
Now make the first bump around to the middle...
And another bump at the bottom! You did it! That's a B!
Now for the Big B Challenge! I'm going to show you some pictures. Only tap the ones that start with the B sound. Are you ready?
Which one starts with B? The butterfly or the cat?
Which one starts with B? The ball or the apple?
Listen: B-b-boat. Which picture is the boat?
Amazing! You unlocked the Letter B badge! You're becoming a letter expert!
Let's remember our friend A for a moment. A says ahh, like apple. A and B are neighbors in the alphabet!
Great job today! You learned the letter B! Next time we'll meet letter C. Can you guess what sound C makes? See you soon!
Let's take a quick stretch break! Stand up and stretch your arms up high like a bear!
Great stretching! Ready to learn more?
Listen again. This one starts with a different sound. Let's try another!
So close! Remember the B sound: buh-buh-buh. Try again!

feedback.text: Excellent! That's definitely a B word!
Almost! Listen for the buh sound at the beginning.
Good try! That one starts with a different letter.
Keep thinking! Remember: B says buh.
You're learning! Let's look at the next one.
Nice effort! Try saying the word out loud.

challenges.title: Hear the B Sound
challenges.instruction: Listen to words that start with B

challenges.title: Find the B Things
challenges.instruction: Tap all pictures that start with B

challenges.title: Write Letter B
challenges.instruction: Trace the letter B with your finger

challenges.title: Big B Challenge
challenges.instruction: Tap the picture that starts with B

curriculumAlignment.description: Demonstrate understanding of the organization and basic features of print
